reviews.reviewTitle: A place close to all access, ports, cities, etc.
reviews.originalTitle: Tempat dekat segala akses, pelabuhan,kota dll.
reviews.originalComment:
Fasilitas kamar lengkap, ac, bed bisa twin, dan kamar mandi lengkap dengan pemanas.
Harganya sangat bersahabat di dompet
reviews.reviewComments: The room facilities are complete, with air conditioning, beds that can be twin, and a bathroom complete with a heater. The price is very wallet-friendly.

reviews.originalComment: pertama dtg ke sabang menuju hotel ini tp ternyata kamarnya sdh habis .jd saya sarankan agar pihak hotel harley lbh selektif lg ahar tdk terjadi tumpang tindih seperti ini jd akhirnya kami dipindahkan ke hotel seulanga di SMKN 1 , dan alhamdulillah kami dpt kamar yg nyaman dgn tmp tdr yg sangat empuk dan bkn hanya itu kami jg dpt kenalan baru , jd yg saya rekom bkn hotel sabangnya tp hotel rekanannya ini.
reviews.reviewComments: First, we came to Sabang to this hotel but it turned out that the rooms were fully booked. So I suggest that the hotel management be more selective to avoid overlaps like this, and in the end, we were moved to Seulanga Hotel at SMKN 1. Thankfully, we got a comfortable room with a very soft bed, and not only that, we also made new acquaintances. So I recommend not Sabang Hotel but this partner hotel instead.

reviews.reviewPositives: Buon rapporto qualità prezzo. Lontano dal centro se non hai lo scooter. Però per appoggio buono. Acqua calda e aria condizionata.

reviews.originalComment:
+ Kamar luas banget, Kmar bersih dn rapi, kamar mandi jg luas dn bersih, fasilitas luamayn lengkap dan harga sngat2 terjangkau
- Kamar di lantai 2 dan gada lift
reviews.reviewComments:
+ The room is very spacious, the room is clean and tidy, the bathroom is also spacious and clean, the additional facilities are complete and the price is very affordable.  
- The room is on the second floor and there is no elevator.

reviews.reviewNegatives: Kami dipindahkan ke hotel lain yg lebih jauh dan buruk

reviews.originalComment: Dekat  akses ke pelabuhan dan kota sabang, tempat nya bersih kamar luas, fasilitas lengkap, staf dan owner nya bersahabat dan ramah, terbaik.....
reviews.reviewComments: Close access to the port and Sabang city, the place is clean, the rooms are spacious, complete facilities, the staff and owner are friendly and welcoming, the best.....

reviews.originalComment: Tempat nya bersih, tenang, nyaman, ada sarana olahraga, frèe antar jemput pelabuhan....
reviews.reviewComments: The place is clean, quiet, comfortable, has sports facilities, and offers free pick-up and drop-off at the port...

reviews.reviewComments: The place is clean, quiet, comfortable, has sports facilities, and offers free pick-up and drop-off at the port...

reviews.originalComment: Semua fasilitas dan kamar hotel bagus banget bersih AC dingin banget cuma agak cemas aja parkir di luar di tepi jalan pula tp Alhamdulillah kemarin aman" aja rekomendasi buat nyari hotel di dekat pelabuhan boleh ni mampir 👍
reviews.reviewComments: All the hotel facilities and rooms are really nice and clean, the air conditioning is very cold, but I'm a bit anxious about parking outside on the roadside. But thank God, it was all safe yesterday. I recommend this place for anyone looking for a hotel near the port, definitely worth stopping by. 👍
Staff and boss of owner very kind. Can ask anything if you got problem.thanks owner send us back to harbour.

reviews.originalComment: Banyak dispensasi, kadang booking kamar unt 2 orang tapi diizinkan unt 3 dan 4 orang karena keluarga, dan dibantu antar free ke pelabuhan
reviews.reviewComments: Many dispensations, sometimes booking a room for 2 people but allowed for 3 and 4 people because of family, and free transportation to the port is provided.

Seriusan ga expect kalau hotel nya nyaman banget. Maaf baru review.. ga expect dengan harga yg affordable kamar mandi nya dapat yg nyediain air panas. So happy. Empuk juga kasur nya.. next ke sabang bakal nginap di sini lagi. Buat kemana mana menurut saja ga jauh.. pokoknya seneng. Terima kasih..

reviews.originalComment:
overall okelah dgn harga segitu..stafnya ramah..pemilik jg ramah..kamar bersih..
minus bed nya udah ada yg jeblos..
reviews.reviewComments: Overall it's okay with that price.. the staff is friendly.. the owner is also friendly.. the room is clean.. the downside is the bed has a hole in it.

The aircon was not perfect but it works, the mattresses were very spongy, so not great for my back. Overall though great value for money, comfy, quiet, functional, and friendly staff. Room has a mini locker for valuables. The hotel has very easy access to airport and ferry port, if you have a scooter or take a taxi.

Sebenarnya nyaman tempat yg dikasih, cuma kita baru nyampe laper, capek, pas harus pindah lokasi karena mreka punya tamu, dan ditawari opsi uang kembali rasanya wuahhh, dah capek mesti cari hotel baru, pdhl mgkn bs dg bhsa yg lbh baik jd pengunjung gak kesal
Oke semuanya....bahkan ada lapangan indoor badminton. Namun posisinya yang jauh dengan kota sabang apalagi wisata di sabang. Lebih deket ke palebuhan

reviews.originalComment: Kamar nya bagus, lengkap AC plus air panas. Sayang salah satu kamar AC nya tidak dingin, sudah lapor staff kurang respon
reviews.reviewComments: The room is nice, complete with air conditioning and hot water. Unfortunately, the air conditioning in one of the rooms is not cool, and I have reported it to the staff but haven't received much response.

reviews.reviewTitle: The price is okay, but the air conditioning is not cold.
reviews.originalTitle: Harga Ok tapi AC tidak dingin
reviews.originalComment: Untuk harga udah ok, tapi sayang hampir semua kamar yang kami pesan ada 3 kamar di lantai 2, semuanya tidak dingin
reviews.reviewComments: The price is fine, but unfortunately almost all the rooms we booked, there are 3 rooms on the second floor, all of them are not cool.

reviews.originalComment:
TV tdk bisa hidup
Gak ada wastafel
AC kurang dingin
Sprei dan sarung bantal gak diganti Krn msh terbau keringat orang
Air minum harus ambil di dispenser
reviews.reviewComments:
The TV doesn't work.  
There is no sink.  
The air conditioning is not cold enough.  
The sheets and pillowcases have not been changed because they still smell like sweat.  
Drinking water must be taken from the dispenser.
good
Please choose another one
Buat harga semurah itu okey banget
Mantap

reviews.originalComment: dekat pelabuhan...stafnya ramah...harga terjangkau..
reviews.reviewComments: near the port...the staff is friendly...affordable prices..

reviews.originalComment: Kamar mandi nya jorok tidak dibersihkan
reviews.reviewComments: The bathroom is dirty and has not been cleaned.

reviews.originalComment: Dekat dari pelabuhan, tidak begitu jauh dari kota
reviews.reviewComments: Close to the port, not so far from the city.

reviews.originalComment: Cocok utk para bikers dan backpaker
reviews.reviewComments: Suitable for bikers and backpackers.

reviews.originalComment: pelanyanannya yang sangat memuaskan
reviews.reviewComments: the resolution that is very satisfying

reviews.originalComment: 5 hari 4 malam disana berasa nyaman... ditengah2 antara pelabuhan dgn kotanya...
reviews.reviewComments: 5 days 4 nights there felt comfortable... in between the harbor and the city...
The hotel is good. I will come back again.

reviews.originalComment: Harga ekonomis sudah dapat penginapan yg ber AC dan kamar mandi dalam...
reviews.reviewComments: The economical price already includes accommodation with air conditioning and an en-suite bathroom...

reviews.originalComment: Sangat salut dg layanan hotel nya, good
reviews.reviewComments: I am very impressed with their hotel service, good.

reviews.originalComment: Harga terjangkau. Cukup murah, tapi tidak murahan
reviews.reviewComments: Affordable price. Quite cheap, but not cheap quality.

reviews.originalComment:
Pas di tengah, jarak ke Jaboi, ke sumurtiga ke anoi itam berdekatan karena posisi hotel di tengah dan mudah di temukan.
Untuk harga sudah ok dengan ekspektasi, cuma syg ga da selimut dan handuk. 
Biasanya hotel slalu menyertakan 2 komponen trsbt.
reviews.reviewComments: Located in the middle, the distance to Jaboi, to Sumurtiga, and to Anoi Itam is close because the hotel is centrally positioned and easy to find. The price is okay with expectations, but unfortunately, there are no blankets and towels. Usually, hotels always provide those two components.

reviews.reviewTitle: Super duper kind and helpful staff
reviews.reviewComments: We are going to Sabang in the peak season when we need to queue for the ferry to pass the sea. Our car need to queue for the chance to get into the ferry since 1 day before our turn. So, we do not have any vehicle to go to the harbour. Kindly the owner offer us the free ride to the harbour and even lend the motion to my husband so he can arrange our car in harbour. Super duper recommended..

reviews.originalComment: Bagus , nyaman dan aman
reviews.reviewComments: Good, comfortable, and safe.

Ketika saya mau book kamar, ternyata sudah penuh..tapi owner, bang fauzi mempersilahkan sy untuk bersih2 badan dlu dan menyediakan tmpt istirahat sementara di dlm hotel nya, smbl menunggu kalau ada yg cancell booking. thanks bang atas kebaikannya..

reviews.originalComment: Sangat recomended, harga murah, kamar luas..bersih, staff ramah..mantap..
reviews.reviewComments: Highly recommended, affordable price, spacious room.. clean, friendly staff.. great..

reviews.originalComment: Saya nginap 2 malam, harga murah, bersih, ac dingin, staff ramah, tidak begitu jauh dari pelabuhan balohan, recommended..mantap...
reviews.reviewComments: I stayed for 2 nights, cheap price, clean, cold air conditioning, friendly staff, not too far from Balohan port, recommended.. great...

reviews.originalComment:
Kamarnya bocor pas hujan, koper dan tas basah
Mungkin owner nya gatau kamarnya bocor, ke kota sekitar 10 menit, ada air panasnya 👍
reviews.reviewComments: The room leaks when it rains, the suitcase and bag got wet. Maybe the owner doesn't know the room is leaking, it's about 10 minutes to the city, and it has hot water. 👍

reviews.reviewTitle: MANTAPP BAKALAN NGINEP LAGI DISINI SIH
reviews.reviewComments:
Kamar bersih, ac dingin , ada air panas😭
Ga nyesel tidur disini nnti nginep lagi deh

reviews.originalComment:
Boleh laaa
Tapi Handuk tdk ada , sabun tdk tersedia
reviews.reviewComments: It's okay, but there's no towel, and soap is not available.

Aria irrespirabile , ambiente sporco lenzuola rotte materasso sporco bagno sporco il climatizzatore faceva fuoriuscire area di smog e ci siamo intossicati e ci bruciava la gola non riuscivamo a respirare, siamo dovuti scappare dalla struttura perché era invivibile non andateci se non volete rovinarvi la vacanza

Bed full of sands, so many mosquitos, the room smell like its never change linen/sheets for weeks! In the middle of hotel there is a badminton court full of player. So loud. Its not worth the stay! Traveloka should romove this hotel from website because this accomodation not meet any standart!
